testcase.name: test_pass_2_5_debtor_tokens_low_confidence

failure.message: AssertionError: debtor_tokens promoted to FULL — must not: {'id': '19fcdfe4-9a48-4e2f-831d-18b8c15a0f5d', 'idx': 0, 'amount': 5400.0, 'remaining': 0.0, 'reference': 'XX9988 RANDOM NOISE FORD CIVIL JOBNO 12-A', 'payer': '', 'date': '2026-01-05', 'matches': [{'bank_id': '19fcdfe4-9a48-4e2f-831d-18b8c15a0f5d', 'invoice_id': '14ba0ff7-d258-4381-93f3-ebde53f8b6e4', 'amount': 5400.0, 'method': 'debtor_tokens', 'confidence': 'low', 'score': 100.0, 'ambiguous': False, 'reason': '2/4 distinctive debtor tokens found in bank text'}], 'status': 'full', 'confidence': 'high', 'reason': 'Unique debtor match at 100.0% with exact amount'} assert 'full' != 'full'

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: debtor_tokens promoted to FULL — must not: {'id': '19fcdfe4-9a48-4e2f-831d-18b8c15a0f5d', 'idx': 0, 'amount': 5400.0, 'remaining': 0.0, 'reference': 'XX9988 RANDOM NOISE FORD CIVIL JOBNO 12-A', 'payer': '', 'date': '2026-01-05', 'matches': [{'bank_id': '19fcdfe4-9a48-4e2f-831d-18b8c15a0f5d', 'invoice_id': '14ba0ff7-d258-4381-93f3-ebde53f8b6e4', 'amount': 5400.0, 'method': 'debtor_tokens', 'confidence': 'low', 'score': 100.0, 'ambiguous': False, 'reason': '2/4 distinctive debtor tokens found in bank text'}], 'status': 'full', 'confidence': 'high', 'reason': 'Unique debtor match at 100.0% with exact amount'} assert 'full' != 'full'
